latest.title: Meteorite that crashed into New Jersey home contains "alien world chemistry," scientists say - CBS News
latest.description: When scientists examined the preserved fragments of a meteorite that crashed in 2024, they found brine-like fluids and key molecules.
latest.content:
A meteorite that crashed into a New Jersey home held prebiotic molecules and other "building blocks of life," astronomers said in a newly published paper. 
The meteorite struck the home in July 2024… [+2443 chars]
